text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer. Thanks for the time off!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I spent it all in my room listening to my favorite
idol. It was sooo relaxing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I feel great, so I'm giving a hundred percent
today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Smart Falcon thoroughly enjoyed her
day off and feels refreshed.
